title: Spike: provider batch limits survey + auto-splitting design
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/112

Survey OpenAI/Gemini/Mistral batch limits. Design automatic input file splitting when JSONL exceeds provider limit. Must work with format choice from compression spike.

**Depends on:** Image compression spike outcome.
**Deliverable:** Provider limit table + splitting algorithm design.
